arts.ttl: Europa League final day - who is through and what's at stake?
arts.sum: Manchester United, Tottenham and Rangers all have something at stake on what promises to be a thrilling final day of the Europa League league phase.

arts.ttl: Porto Join Lazio & Torino in Race for Out-of-Favor Chelsea Midfielder
arts.sum: Portuguese heavyweights Porto have reportedly joined Lazio and Torino in the race for outgoing Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei. According to famous journalist Gianluca Di Marzio, the former Primeira Liga champions inquired about the Italian midfielder's availability on Tuesday. The post Porto Join Lazio & Torino in Race for Out-of-Favor Chelsea Midfielder appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Porto enter Casadei race: Torino watch on, Lazio turn to Bologna
arts.sum: Porto are the latest club to enter the race for Italy U21 star Cesare Casadei,...
